title: leucas calostachys var. schweinfurthii
intro: Leucas calostachys var. schweinfurthii, also known as Schweinfurth's leucas, is a plant species that belongs to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to Africa. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic activities. The health benefits of Schweinfurth's leucas include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and treat skin conditions such as wounds and infections. Traditionally, the plant is used in herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are used to treat various ailments.
